message:
feat(context-health): implement auto-healing context window management

Add ContextHealthService with graduated interventions:
- Health status monitoring (healthy/warning/critical/emergency thresholds)
- Token tracking and projection for overflow estimation
- Compaction via summarization and pruning strategies
- Session rotation with context transfer for emergency recovery
- REST API endpoints: health check, compact, rotate, history
- Comprehensive test suite (37 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
